queue.name: button
queue.spec: Primary interactive element. Supports variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading state, disabled state, and optional leading/trailing icons. Keyboard: Enter, Space. Role: button.

queue.name: input
queue.spec: Text input field. Supports label, helper text, error state, disabled state, leading/trailing adornments. Fully controlled and uncontrolled modes.

queue.name: modal
queue.spec: Dialog overlay using native <dialog> element. Controlled open/close. Focus trap. Backdrop click to dismiss. Keyboard: Escape to close.

queue.name: card
queue.spec: Container component. Optional header, body, footer sections. Supports hover/interactive variant.

queue.name: badge
queue.spec: Inline label for status, count, or category. Variants: default, success, warning, error, info. Sizes: sm, md.

queue.name: textarea
queue.spec: Multi-line text input. Label, hint, error state. resize prop (none/vertical/both). idle/focused/error machine like Input. A11y: role textbox, aria-multiline.

queue.name: select
queue.spec: Native <select> wrapper. Label, hint, error, placeholder, options array, size. Chevron via masked SVG. idle/focused/error machine. A11y: role combobox.

queue.name: checkbox
queue.spec: Hidden native checkbox + CSS :checked indicator. label, indeterminate (set via ref effect), disabled. A11y: role checkbox, keyboard Space.

queue.name: radio
queue.spec: Radio + RadioGroup. Hidden native radio with CSS indicator. RadioGroup drills name/checked via cloneElement (no context). A11y: role radio/radiogroup, arrow keys.

queue.name: toggle
queue.spec: Switch built as <button role=switch>. Controlled + uncontrolled (on/off machine). Sliding thumb via translate. Sizes sm/md. A11y: aria-checked, keyboard Space.

queue.name: slider
queue.spec: Native <input type=range> with custom track/thumb styling under @supports. Label, min/max/step. A11y: role slider, arrow keys, Home/End.

queue.name: tooltip
queue.spec: CSS-positioned tooltip shown on hover/focus. hidden/visible machine, configurable delay. @starting-style enter animation. A11y: role tooltip, aria-describedby on trigger.

queue.name: dropdown
queue.spec: Menu from a trigger. closed/open machine, controlled override. Full keyboard nav (arrows/Home/End/Enter/Escape), roving tabindex, outside-click dismiss. A11y: role menu/menuitem.

queue.name: toast
queue.spec: ToastProvider + useToast hook. Signal-backed queue, max 3 visible, auto-dismiss. Per-toast entering/visible/dismissing/gone machine. A11y: aria-live polite (assertive for destructive).

queue.name: alert
queue.spec: Inline message. Variants default/info/success/warning/destructive, optional icon, title, dismissible. A11y: role alert for urgent, role status otherwise.

queue.name: avatar
queue.spec: User image with initials fallback via loading/loaded/error machine driven by img onLoad/onError. Sizes xs-xl, optional status dot. A11y: img alt / aria-label fallback.

queue.name: separator
queue.spec: Divider. <hr> for horizontal, <div role=separator> for vertical. decorative prop hides from a11y. Logical-property borders.

queue.name: tabs
queue.spec: Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent. Shared signal store via createContext + use(). Roving arrow-key nav, Home/End. A11y: role tablist/tab/tabpanel, aria-selected/controls/labelledby.

queue.name: accordion
queue.spec: Accordion/AccordionItem/AccordionTrigger/AccordionContent. single/multiple modes, signal store via createContext + use(). grid-template-rows 0fr->1fr animation. A11y: aria-expanded/controls.

queue.name: spinner
queue.spec: Pure-CSS rotating border indicator. Sizes sm/md/lg, screen-reader label. Shared by Button's loading state. A11y: role status, aria-label.

queue.name: kbd
queue.spec: Keyboard key indicator. Renders a <kbd> element styled like a physical key (subtle border, inset shadow, mono font). Props: size (sm | md). Pure display — no machine, no signals, no interactive state. A11y: native <kbd> semantics, no extra role.
